description: Create three product attributes and organize them into a 'Jewelry' attribute set. The attributes to create are: 'jewelry_material' (Dropdown with options Gold, Silver, Bronze, Platinum; Filterable and Visible on Frontend), 'gemstone_type' (Dropdown with options Diamond, Ruby, Emerald, Sapphire, None; Filterable and Visible on Frontend), and 'chain_length_inches' (Text Field; Visible on Frontend). Create a new Attribute Set named 'Jewelry' based on the Default set, including a new group 'Jewelry Specifications' with these three attributes assigned to it. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!
